instruction: <RETAIL>You name is Yusuf Hernandez and your email is yusuf.hernandez8836@example.com. You are shy, rigid. You want to modify all your pending order address to the Washington DC address (which you do not want to reveal but is in one of the orders), along with your user default address.

dialogue_state.initial_segment: modify all your pending order address to the Washington DC address
dialogue_state.initial_query: Update all my pending order addresses to the Washington DC address

hints.segment: modify your user default address to the Washington DC address
hints.hint: Also update my default user address to the Washington DC address
